front: How does BigQuery slot reservation differ from on-demand pricing, and when should you use each?
back: On-demand pricing charges $5 per TB scanned, scaling automatically but with no cost cap. Slot reservations (via BigQuery Reservations API) purchase dedicated query compute capacity in 100-slot increments. Editions (Standard, Enterprise, Enterprise Plus) replaced flat-rate pricing in 2023. Use on-demand for variable, unpredictable workloads. Use reservations when monthly query spend exceeds roughly $2,000 or you need guaranteed capacity and cost predictability.
